_comment: Single source of truth for the MoaV protocol roster. Edit here, then run: python3 scripts/gen-protocol-docs.py --write. CI runs --check to fail on drift. See docs/devdocs/PROTOCOL-INTEGRATION-CHECKLIST.md.

protocols.name: Reality (VLESS)
protocols.blurb: VLESS with TLS camouflage indistinguishable from a real site

protocols.name: Trojan
protocols.blurb: password-authenticated TLS proxy, looks like HTTPS

protocols.name: AnyTLS
protocols.blurb: defeats TLS-in-TLS fingerprinting

protocols.name: Hysteria2
protocols.blurb: QUIC-based, fast on lossy networks

protocols.name: Shadowsocks-2022
protocols.blurb: AEAD-2022, anti-probing, Outline-compatible

protocols.name: CDN (VLESS+WS)
protocols.blurb: VLESS through Cloudflare/CloudFront when the IP is blocked

protocols.name: TrustTunnel
protocols.blurb: HTTP/2 and QUIC tunnel that looks like HTTPS

protocols.name: WireGuard
protocols.blurb: full L3 VPN, direct UDP

protocols.name: AmneziaWG
protocols.blurb: obfuscated WireGuard that defeats DPI

protocols.name: WireGuard (wstunnel)
protocols.blurb: WireGuard wrapped in wss:// WebSocket for UDP-blocked networks

protocols.name: Telegram MTProxy
protocols.blurb: Fake-TLS V2 for direct Telegram access

protocols.name: dnstt
protocols.blurb: KCP+Noise DNS tunnel

protocols.name: Slipstream
protocols.blurb: QUIC-over-DNS tunnel

protocols.name: MasterDNS
protocols.blurb: advanced DNS tunnel (ARQ + resolver LB), MahsaNG v16

protocols.name: GooseRelay
protocols.blurb: SOCKS5 over a Google Apps Script, fronted as google.com

protocols.name: Psiphon Conduit
protocols.blurb: donate bandwidth to Psiphon's relay network

protocols.name: XHTTP (VLESS+XHTTP+Reality)
protocols.blurb: multiplexed HTTP with Reality camouflage, no domain needed

protocols.name: XDNS (VLESS+mKCP+DNS)
protocols.blurb: DNS tunnel via Xray FinalMask, works during heavy shutdowns

protocols.name: Tor Snowflake
protocols.blurb: donate bandwidth as a Tor Snowflake proxy

protocols.name: MahsaNet
protocols.blurb: donate VPN configs to Mahsa VPN (2M+ users in Iran)
